session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14 B016 planning: B015 done wrap-up confirmed (6/6 PASS); user selected BL-B010-S3 HRP upgrade as next batch direction. Rationale: B010 plain inverse-vol is reused as B011 master portfolio risk_parity sleeve and B013 L2 engine; upgrading once benefits multiple downstream paths. arxiv 2026 research material (Beyond De Prado and Cotton, Hierarchical Min Variance, Topological RP) strongly supports HRP variants over plain inverse-vol on out-of-sample Sharpe + drawdown + stability. Plus the B014 cross-strategy finding (B010 underperformed static 60/40 by ~25pp in 2020-06..2022-12) motivates testing whether correlation-aware HRP closes some of that gap on the same real snapshot. Project constraint check: trade/ modules are pure-stdlib zero-third-party-deps (only yfinance, in scripts/ only). HRP must be implemented in pure stdlib (math + statistics + dataclasses + typing) — no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn. Small algorithm, ~200 lines, reviewable. Decisions captured: (1) weighting_method tightened from free str to Literal['inverse_volatility', 'hrp'] with default 'inverse_volatility'; (2) HRP lives in new trade/strategies/risk_parity_hrp.py; (3) B010 workflow dispatches based on policy; (4) comparative backtest harness reuses B014 snapshot + sidecar baseline; (5) default must reproduce B010 signoff bit-for-bit (backwards-compat hard requirement); (6) B011/B012/B013/B014/B015 strategy code untouched; (7) no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn imports anywhere. Wrote B016 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex; mixed batch). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
